etymology.description: Depicts a long river with tributaries -> original form
etymology.interpretation: The character 𠂢 is a pictographic representation of a long river with tributaries, symbolizing its original form as it visually attempts to capture the imagery of flowing water and branching paths. It is described as the horizontal flip of 永(永) (yǒng, meaning 'eternal'), though its depiction clearly relates more to an aquatic landscape than an everlasting concept.
